docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LEIU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY, PER CCP 585 (D) BY NASIR PATEL. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WESLEY, LEE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESLEY, LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: MARATHON HOTEL 710 ELLIS ST., SF CA 94109 #44A, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WESLEY, LEE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WESLEY, LEE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR AS TO DEFENDANT WESLEY, LEE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR SERVED AUG-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WESLEY, LEE
DECLARATION OF OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $23.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NASIR
